---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or an improvement to an existing one.
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## What you want to be able to do

A clear, short description of the capability.

## Why mneme is the right place for it

The project values are listed in
[CONTRIBUTING.md](../../CONTRIBUTING.md). Briefly explain why the
feature is consistent with "local-first, interpretable, modular".
Features that would require a cloud call or a non-interpretable
model are unlikely to land.

## Sketch of an implementation

Optional. If you have an idea of which module the change touches and
how the public API would shift, write it here. A Protocol-level
sketch is enough; full code is not required for a discussion.

## Alternatives considered

What else could solve the same problem? Why is the proposed feature
the best of those?
